programme.desc: The new head of the Priority Murder Squad investigates the murder of an unknown woman.

programme.desc: After an officer-involved shooting leaves two L.A. policemen dead, the Major Crimes unit must work with the Deputy Chief of the LAPD Special Operations Bureau, Fritz Howard, to piece together this high stakes case of disguise.

programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues
programme.desc: With only two days left before they must head back to Dutch Harbor for King Crab season, Josh and Casey have one last goal to achieve in Hawaii: land a big marlin, the one fish that eluded Phil Harris decades ago.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make vodka, once the secret to surviving a Russian winter, and now America's most-consumed spirit. Mark, Digger and Tim judge as distillers design their own stills and mash in their own raw ingredients.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: George Washington Rye
programme.desc: Three distillers compete to make a recipe created by George Washington himself. Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only one competitor can earn the prestigious title of Master Distiller for producing the first president's own signature liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Judges
programme.desc: Tim Smith challenges Mark and Digger to a moonshine-making rematch. Hot stills and hotter heads clash as all three legends face off to see who can bring the best jar of moonshine to the table and win the ultimate bragging rights.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Unexpected Revelations
programme.desc: After 70 years of searching, Stephen Dilbeck gets some shocking information about his birth family from Jane and Lisa. Meanwhile, Chris and Sallie work on getting approval of an exhumation that will answer questions for hundreds of Hicks babies.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Buried Truth
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa share the news about the exhumation with a group of Hicks Babies that have questioned whether Dr. Hicks was in fact their biological father. Sallie faces the reality of exhuming her father. The exhumation begins.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Secrets from the Grave
programme.desc: Wendy and her team encounter unexpected challenges with the exhumation. Sallie struggles emotionally with her decision to exhume. After the exhumation, Sallie and the Hicks babies learn the DNA results. Hicks babies are connected with their family.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sibling Supper
programme.desc: A few of Kardea's brothers and sisters are getting together at her place to catch up and share a meal. She's making a slow-roasted onion dip as an appetizer along with grilled garlic bread.

programme.desc: Kardea and her nieces are out on the farm to pick blueberries for brunch. Kardea whips up fluffy Blueberry Ricotta Pancakes with blueberry-honey sauce, Cheesy Baked Eggs with Potatoes and Mustard Greens and refreshing Honey Orangeade.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Hutchinson House Dinner
programme.desc: Kardea Brown hosts a traditional Southern fish fry for a fundraiser to benefit the Hutchinson House. The dinner features fried cornmeal crusted catfish and loaded baked potato salad. For dessert, Kardea bakes an old-fashioned lemon buttermilk pie.

programme.desc: With just seven days to spare, Marty and Matt are determined to build a family the ultimate livestock fort against a pack of unruly coyotes. In the Ozarks, the family joins forces to help a sickly couple living in grave conditions.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Great Kilcher Quake
programme.desc: A massive earthquake hits Southern Alaska and the Kilcher family scrambles to recover. They fight to re-open vital access roads. Atz Lee races towards his dream of a new remote homestead to aid in recovery, creating waves with his wife, Jane.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Shattered Shelter
programme.desc: Mother Nature continues her onslaught on the Kilcher homestead, using a variety of weapons. Otto, Charlotte, Jane, Bonnie, and August scramble to save a hay barn. Atz Lee and Sr. begin building Atz Lee's new cabin.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Bad Cat Karma
programme.desc: Justin gave his mother a new kitten as a gift, never expecting it would be the gift from hell.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Lost Continent (Madagascar)
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Elderly chameleon, Mr. Parsons, has a romantic date with young Daphne from France. It's his last chance to father a child. They first met last year but their rendezvous didn't go well so keepers are hoping for better luck second time around.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nature's Super HQ
programme.desc: Pete and NTS give superhero efforts to build a treehouse for the For-Mar Nature Preserve just outside Flint, MI. The 5-platform 'nature headquarters' will serve as a positive addition to a community still reeling from the water crisis that began in 2014.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slithering Slam Dunk
programme.desc: A call from NBA star Dwight Howard sends Brett and Wayde to Houston. But Howard doesn't just want a fish tank, he also wants a new habitat for his two snakes!

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dog Town, USA
programme.desc: Antonio helps a family who opened their home to neighbourhood dogs create the ultimate backyard dog park with cool, custom dog houses. It has a paddling pool for hot days and a structure of ramps and tunnels to keep everyone entertained and active.

programme.title: Movie: Johnson Family Vacation
programme.desc: As the Johnsons head out on their annual family reunion, it becomes a question of survival as Nate Johnson fights with the onboard navigation system, while the rest of the family join the ride very reluctantly.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: NCIS: Handle With Care
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team work to clear the name of retired Marine Sergeant John Ross when cyanide is found in one of the hundreds of care packages he sends to active-duty Marines.

programme.title: NCIS: One Man's Trash
programme.desc: Gibbs and Ducky see an antique war stick on television that could be the missing murder weapon to a 16-year-old cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: Death From Above
programme.desc: The NCIS headquarters are evacuated after bomb materials and a body are discovered on the roof above the squad room. Also, the team reads the first draft of Ducky's book.

programme.title: NCIS: The Numerical Limit
programme.desc: Gibbs is granted protective custody of a 10-year-old orphaned refugee, Elena, when an NCIS case reveals she is the target of a violent gang.

programme.title: NCIS: Sight Unseen
programme.desc: NCIS searches for a petty officer suspected of assault who escapes when the sheriff transporting him crashes into a lake. Also, Torres works closely with Annie Barth, a key blind witness who heard vital evidence to solve the case.

programme.title: NCIS: One Step Forward
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder as she believes the local authorities convicted the wrong man. Also, Abby is awarded a dinner reservation to a new five-star restaurant, and must decide who to invite.

programme.title: NCIS: Two Steps Back
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman’s latest target, the team must search through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Field of Fire
programme.desc: The team searches for a former marine and expert sniper who escaped a veteran's hospital when they discover his connection to the leader of an extremist group.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Kolcheck, A.
programme.desc: Callen and Sam search for answers when they find crew members from the missing oil tanker used in Arkady's deal with Russia and also discover Arkady's personal connection to the ship.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Chernoff, K.
programme.desc: The case involving Arkady and his personal connection to an oil tanker now leads Callen, Sam, Deeks and Kensi to Moscow, where they must assume many undercover identities to locate their suspect. Meanwhile, Callen uncovers new information about his dad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Shrink-Wrapped
programme.desc: Detectives delve into the murder of a musician who was linked to his married psychiatrist.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Saint
programme.desc: Detectives probe the murder of an elderly woman poisoned with an unknown substance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Conscience
programme.desc: After a doctor is found poisoned in a pool, detectives probe her controversial research.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: When a recently divorced mother is found strangled to death on her couch, several suspects emerge until the killer is revealed to be someone close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Jersey Nightmare
programme.desc: A recently retired woman is found savagely murdered, and detectives must battle a lack of evidence and track down a long list of suspects to find a killer nobody saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Fatal Ambition
programme.desc: A hard-working young woman is discovered stabbed at the side of a road, leading police on a tireless investigation for 10 years to unveil a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Disrespect
programme.desc: After a 35-year-old analyst for the NSA is fatally stabbed, police look at a number of suspects. As detectives close in on the killer, the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: Snapped: Marcela Whaley
programme.desc: An investigation into the heinous murder of a college student in Las Vegas ignites an international manhunt and exposes a lethal love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Deidra Griffin
programme.desc: When the decaying body of a Baltimore man is discovered in his garage, detectives use advanced law enforcement technology to pinpoint a cunning killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Constance Tomich
programme.desc: The peace of an Indiana town is interrupted on Valentine's Day 2003, when police receive a report of a violent murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Patricia Monsell
programme.desc: The murder of a New Jersey entrepreneur leaves investigators stumped... until months later, when a drug bust brings to light a murder plot riddled with greed, addiction, and betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Theresa Tolliver
programme.desc: Two young boys are left fatherless when an Air Force sergeant is gunned down by a pair of intruders in his San Antonio home.

programme.title: Movie: Breaking In
programme.desc: While setting her late father's estate in his fortress-like house, a mother is trapped outside when would-be burglars activate the security system and lock the house down. With her children on the inside, she stops at nothing to rescue them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fat Blue Line
programme.desc: During the San Castellanta street festival, much of the town realizes their wallets have been pickpocketed. After the state investigator puts the wrong man in jail, Chief Wiggum sets out to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXX
programme.desc: Three stories of horror feature a demon Maggie, a mission to rescue Milhouse from another dimension, dead-Homer's spirit trying on some new bodies for size and Selma finally finding love in an unlikely place: the alien in the basement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorillas on the Mast
programme.desc: After a trip to Aquatraz Water Park, Lisa becomes determined to set free Springfield's most vicious animals in captivity. Meanwhile, Homer fulfills a lifelong dream of buying a boat, and quickly realizes boat ownership sucks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Livin La Pura Vida
programme.desc: The Simpsons join other Springfield families on the Van Houten's annual trip to Costa Rica, which they obviously can't afford. While there, Homer befriends Patty’s new girlfriend, Evelyn.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thanksgiving of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons are forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares, including the first Thanksgiving, an A.I. mishap and a dangerous space mission complicated by a sentient cranberry sauce.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: In this Flanders family-focused episode, Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith causing great distress for Ned, who sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back into God's arms.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bobby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob gets contracted as this year's Mall Santa. Meanwhile, someone is stealing all the Christmas packages off people's front porches and needs to be tracked down to save Christmas.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hail to the Teeth
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realize that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: The sea captain finds a treasure he's been searching for all his life, but it's taken from him by the townspeople. Marge convinces the people of Springfield to build a S.T.E.M. school with the money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Bad Guy
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a brand-new superhero movie a month before it comes out and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Screenless
programme.desc: Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, all of whom all easily adjust to the new lifestyle. However, Marge realizes that she is the one addicted not her husband and children.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Better Off Ned
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz. Then, a heroic act by Homer makes Bart look up to him again.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Gun Fever Too: Still Hot
programme.desc: After Frank appears on local television advocating gun ownership, the rest of the gang takes a look at the ownership process and alternative to find a common ground to the heated issue.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Tries Desperately to Win an Award
programme.desc: Tired of failing to be recognized for their years of service in the bar industry, the gang changes their ways to give the patrons what they think they want.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Dennis Buy a Timeshare
programme.desc: The gang does their best to recoup their investments in questionable schemes by dumping their losses on Ben the soldier while trying to avoid being duped again by whatever mastermind is pulling their strings.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Day
programme.desc: The gang gets a day to do what they want while everyone else must participate willingly. This is Mac's Day and it's got twice the 'Mac'.

programme.title: Movie: Breaking In

programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Law & Order: Kids
programme.desc: An illegal gun market is unearthed after a teenager is killed in a drive-by shooting.

programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe deal with a heavy caseload during a 24-hour period.

programme.desc: Quark is reunited with love of his life and is willing to sacrifice everything for her.

programme.desc: An accident turns O'Brien's eight year old daughter into a wild eighteen year old.

programme.desc: The Defiant crew encounter a distress call from a Starfleet Captain stranded on a planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Image in the Sand

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Shadows and Symbols
programme.desc: Sisko meets Ezri, the new host of the Dax symbiont, before departing Earth for Tyree.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: After Image
programme.desc: Ezri accepts the position of counsellor to help Garak overcome his fear of claustrophobia.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Legacy
programme.desc: A mission leads the crew to Tasha Yar's birthplace, where they encounter her sister.

programme.desc: Picard is chosen to mediate a Klingon power struggle by the poisoned Emperor.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bloodlines

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bare Bones
programme.desc: As a pandemic sweeps the globe, Alaskans face strange times in daylight’s return.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Big Catch

programme.desc: The ZooTampa family is growing as Ceduna the Female Koala has a baby inside her pouch!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's All Dutch to Me

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hooked on a Feline
programme.desc: A three-legged feline is hanging around clinic, and he's here to stay!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Show Me the Honey
programme.desc: A vet assistant shadows Dr. Pol hoping to get into vet school.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Dr. Emily, Dr. Brenda, and Dr. Pol take on big and small cases.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Blazing Bison
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley deals with a tricky bladder problem in a cat and a rowdy bison needs wrangling.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Josh continues his journey through Egypt to uncover the secrets, and possibly the final resting place, of ancient history's most powerful women rulers: Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Fortune of the Buzzard
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases the lost treasure of Olivier Levasseur, AKA 'The Buzzard,' rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Fortune of the Buzzard
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases the lost treasure of Olivier Levasseur, AKA 'The Buzzard,' rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Terror on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: The remains of a Scottish castle adapted into a WWII hospital and a classified complex on Lake Michigan are now forgotten ruins. Experts investigate the secrets of these military facilities to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there, but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena that can be found in deepest reaches of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest
programme.desc: The universe is a dangerous place, and we explore the deadliest spots in the cosmos. Between earth and the edge of the universe, there are a million ways to die, and our crash test dummy is on a mission to reveal the worst.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Ice Creatures
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong goes into an unexplained spin. He needs to figure out what's causing it, or he faces certain death. An Apollo 17 photo seems to show a U.S. military outpost on the moon. Could there be alien life swimming in the oceans of Jupiter's moons?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: Dead Silent: His Blue Light
programme.desc: In the mid-to-late 1990s, a sexual predator police dub 'The Blue Light Rapist' goes on a serial attack spree across Arkansas. As authorities scramble to stop him in his tracks, he sets his sights on seventeen-year-old Shannon Woods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: The Clown and the Candyman: The Apex Predator
programme.desc: Serial killers Dean Corll and John Wayne Gacy's links to an elaborate nationwide pedophile trafficking ring are revealed for the first time - a network that included prominent members of society with tentacles in some of our most trusted organizations.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: The Clown and the Candyman: The Apex Predator
programme.desc: Serial killers Dean Corll and John Wayne Gacy's links to an elaborate nationwide pedophile trafficking ring are revealed for the first time - a network that included prominent members of society with tentacles in some of our most trusted organizations.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: Betrayed: Family Fatale
programme.desc: Ruie Ann Park is the J.R. Ewing of Van Buren, AR – wealthy and sharp-tongued, but fair. She rules with her town with wit and flair, until her son's increasingly scandalous lifestyle and others' lust for her money bring her to a bitter, horrific end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cash In
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the chips are down when these Deadly Women decide to 'Cash In.'

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Missey Martinez struggles through a hard knock childhood, but eventually finds stability in the exotic world of stripping. And when she starts dating her high school crush, she is making a high stakes gamble that can only end one way, violently.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Family Ties
programme.desc: A young woman scarred by childhood traumas struggles to rebuild her life. She meets the man of her dreams but once they're engaged the couple's relationship crumbles. It's a dangerous game of he said she said that finally comes to a bloody end.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: The Missing: Night Out Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Brian Shaffer is seen on camera going in to a bar with friends, but isn't seen leaving. Friends and family are baffled as to what happened to Brian. And then James Liedtka is seen on camera leaving a bar, but is never heard from again.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mother and Child
programme.desc: Joanna Clark doesn't show up to work and her daughter, Shariece, misses school. They both vanish on the same day, just hours apart. And then pregnant Akia Eggleston misses her baby shower and is never seen again.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Manager's Murder
programme.desc: Five months before restaurant manager John Thurberg is to be married, his fiance is devastated to learn of his murder at work. The motive is not initially clear, but when police question employees, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: A mother of three is shot point-blank with a high-caliber rifle just steps from her front door. To catch a two-faced killer with a history of violence, Demery must first win the trust of a family wary of the system.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Searching for Secrets
programme.desc: A beautiful college freshman is missing. A nationwide search ensues before her friend helps unravel a secret that cracks the case. Erin Moriarty is the correspondent.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Tunnel of Hate
programme.desc: An industrious woman and an ambitious man become neighbors when they buy adjoining houses. Both intend to restore the derelict homes to former glory, but when one of the renovations falls badly behind, it leads to conflict and a shocking murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.desc: The team faces cold winter weather as they attempt to quickly salvage as much as possible from an old church in Laurel, DE. They remove large stained glass, ceiling tiles, and doors. Later, a build shapes up to look like an outhouse.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Race Is On: The Builders Set Their Course
programme.desc: Three men set out to build three cabins in remote areas of the Alaskan Frontier. They will make preparations in the harsh Alaskan winter and race against time, the bitter cold, and the wilderness to complete their builds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Chicken or Bust
programme.desc: Lee Raymond is struggling to get back on track after losing a month to bad weather. Meanwhile, Chuck had has perfect weather, but most of his labor is due to leave in less than a month so he's got to move hard and fast.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Long Hard Slog
programme.desc: After battling the tragedy of the loss of his right-hand man, Ryan Beachy, Chuck Gerwig is back in the saddle and ready to finish the job that he and Ryan started months earlier.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Downward Slide
programme.desc: As the days get shorter and colder, and snow is visible on the highest peaks, the builders frantically race to get their homes sealed in.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The End Game
programme.desc: Winter has arrived and the race is over. It's time for each of our builders to come to terms with their end games as they pack up and head home for the season. To say this year has been a challenge would be an understatement.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Reclaiming a One-Room Log Schoolhouse
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders go deep in the holler to reclaim a rare one-room log schoolhouse full of history. Back on the bone yard, the schoolhouse gets a whole new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving a Rare Log Springhouse
programme.desc: Mark and the guys wade in the water to save a dilapidated Springhouse. Johnny and Tim go exploring while Mark and Graham clean up the spring. Back on the boneyard, they rebuild the Springhouse and finish the inside of the Container Cabin!

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down a Huge New England Style Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys make a rare trip north to dismantle an enormous, 200-year old barn. The barn is so big it takes extra hands to get the barnwood down, and a crane to lift out the valuable beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding After the Flood
programme.desc: Nearby, the town of White Sulphur Springs was devastated by a recent flood. Mark and the guys step up to help their neighbour rebuild. They repair a garage by wrapping it in barnwood and use log skins to transform a shed into a playroom.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid XIII: Destination Chickpea
programme.desc: How to travel cheaply around the world if you have dry chickpeas in your pantry.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Bird in the Pie Is Worth Two in the Bush
programme.desc: Alton Brown looks at ways to resurrect classic foods like chicken potpie.

programme.title: Good Eats: Devil of a Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown reinvents the classic Devil's food cake and its cousin red velvet.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 4: Lasagna
programme.desc: Learn how to make lasagna, the number one comfort food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charlotte
programme.desc: Andrew explores Charlotte, NC, a city where big banking meets blue-collar traditions and is buzzing with amazing food. He zeroes in on barbecue, livermush, fried green tomatoes and other eats that are oozing Southern charm.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's 2D House of Horror/ It's a Wishful Life
programme.desc: A lava flow threatens Vicky's house; Timmy wishes he was never born.

programme.title: Tooned In: Slimeaggedon! Johnny v Leehie v Nick
ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dr. Zap vs Electroboy/ Animal House Party
programme.desc: Theodore is hit by lightning and believes he's like his comic book hero, until he's told he's actually a villain. When Derek overhears that Alvin and his brothers are alone for the weekend, he plans a wild party.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date
programme.desc: All 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day. Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House: Dance Dance Resolution/ A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Lincoln's sisters accidentally land him four dates for the Sadie Hawkins dance at school. When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Problem/ Power Mad
programme.desc: Timmy wants to do 'adult' things; Chester and AJ are stranded in virtual reality.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chin Up/ Dogs Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his favourite comic book hero into reality; Timmy becomes a dog.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Secrety Origin of Denzel Crocker
programme.desc: Every March 15th, Denzel Crocker reaches new heights in terror. Timmy has had enough and goes back in time to discover it's the date Crocker lost his fairies when he was a kid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Bad Heir Day/ Freak and Greeks
programme.desc: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed 'fortune and fame.' Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life. Timmy destroys Mt. Olympus and now all the Greek gods pay him a visit seeking revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Love at First Bark / Desperate Without Housewives
programme.desc: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg's new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky. When Mom won't stop nagging Timmy and Dad, Timmy wishes all women away for one day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Most Wanted Wish/ This Is Your Wish
programme.desc: Timmy wishes he was the most wanted kid in America; Mamma Cosmo is back.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Remy Rides Again/ Hassle in the Castle
programme.desc: Timmy slips into Cosmo and Wanda's fish castle; Remy fools Timmy into being his friend.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fly Boy/ Temporary Fairy
programme.desc: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, 'Fly Boy.' Cosmo and Wanda are too busy taking care of Poof to tend to an overly adventurous Timmy, so he wishes up a 'temporary fairy' and Jorgen is more than happy to fulfill Timmy's wishes.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner/ New Roomie
programme.desc: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Fight for Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: A bitter feud between Scrooge and his sister spreads to the rest of the family as Phantom Blot attempts to steal a priceless artifact and destroy Castle McDuck once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Adventure!
programme.desc: The future of adventuring hangs in the balance as the Duck family uncovers earth-shattering secrets in a final standoff with the Fiendish Organization for World Larceny (F.O.W.L.).

programme.title: The Closer: Flashpoint

programme.title: Major Crimes: Fifth Dynasty
programme.desc: After Major Crimes identifies a murder victim as the son of State Superior Court judge known for being tough on criminals, the squad hunts through her current case load for clues. They find a case linked to an Aryan motorcycle gang and a missing boy.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Four of a Kind
programme.desc: Four wealthy one percenters are left for dead outside a hospital emergency room in a twisty- curvy murder that leads through an impossible list of suspects.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Blackout
programme.desc: Jack Raydor is back again, defending a man who is attempting to withdraw a confession in the murder of his wife. A last-second video purporting to provide the defendant with an alibi alerts the Major Crimes team to the possibility of a conspiracy.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Defending Your Wife

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: In 1982 the first of over 50 victims of America's most prolific serial killer were discovered. After being at large for two decades, 'forensic microscopy' was used to link the women to the killer.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murder in Vegas

programme.desc: Mark and Digger invent a new recipe turning hundreds of jars of expired mandarin oranges into marketable liquor. Tickle and the Laws face headaches in their attempt to produce freeze-distilled apple liquor. Mike and Jerry make birch bark moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tennessee Whiskey
programme.desc: Mark and Digger discover a limestone source to make Tennessee Whiskey right under their feet. Just when Tim thought he was out, the Laws pulls him back in to cross state lines in search of a key ingredient. Richard turns cotton candy into moonshine.

programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Tensions rise with rumours of closing ports and a pandemic. Russian boats disappear, Josh fights to get home to see his brother and Sig's daughter is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Expedition X: Devil in the Forest
programme.desc: After receiving brand-new, frightening reports, Josh Gates sends Jessica and Phil to the woods of southern New Jersey to hunt for the infamous Jersey Devil. Locals are terrified by a demonic creature that's terrorized them for more than 300 years.

programme.title: Expedition X: Ghosts in the Swamp
programme.desc: Terrifying apparitions in a Texas swamp lead Josh Gates to send his team to the notorious Big Thicket. The area is crawling with venomous snakes but what really frightens Phil and Jess are mysterious Ghost Lights that have haunted locals for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Four years after Josh Gates went on a journey to find the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he travels to the newly rediscovered town of Turbek for some shocking new revelations about the case.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: John Gates joins treasure hunters in the search for the Golden Owl, worth half a million dollars. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues as to where the Owl statuette is hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazi Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Josh heads to Europe to expose the last secrets of the Third Reich. The lost fortune of a Nazi war criminal draws Josh to Austria, where he may need to dive deep to find treasure. He also meets a researcher who may have made a historic find.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Unpolished: Bad Business
programme.desc: While Lexi works hard on a unique set of amusement park nails, Bria remains distracted by her personal life. When the salon has trouble making rent, Jen has no other choice but to ask Lexi to step it up, which leads to a mother-daughter blow up.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Milestones and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's a week of milestones and meltdowns. The family gets a big van, and their first drive is frightening. The twins graduate from kindergarten, but Bridge has a major fit. Sextuplets turn 6-months, and a group photo shoot turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: No Finish Line With Nine
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric stress about hosting a big 5K charity event, while also making sure the six babies stay on track developmentally. Major decisions need to be made, knowing Courtney's maternity leave pay is ending and they may be losing their nanny soon.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Shelly
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Shelley has been penny-pinching in Mesa, Ariz. for over 20 years. But Shelley's biggest money-saving challenge is going to be throwing her daughter Ashley's wedding on a $1,000 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: All 12 Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent performs a delicate surgery when she treats a toddler born with 12 toes. Dr. Schaeffer meets a nudist with funky feet, and things get tense during a foot reconstruction procedure when the patient wakes up in the middle of surgery.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse
