programme.desc: Despite having the longest big toes Dr. Brad has ever seen, Anna hopes for the feet she's always wanted. Russell visits Dr. Ebonie with feet that look like hooves. Patty lost most of her foot in an extreme amputation, and she needs Dr. Sarah's help.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Sixth Toe Surprise
programme.desc: Troy's extra toe causes him pain, and he hopes Dr. Ebonie can provide him with relief. Dr. Brad does his best to untangle a ballet dancer's twisted feet. Ramon turns to Dr. Ebonie for help with the massive sacks of fluid hanging from his leg and ankle.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Corn Crazy
programme.desc: Michael visits Dr. Sarah to see if she can help with his twisted toes. Robyn has big corns on her feet and hopes Dr. Brad can cut them out so she'll be able to walk pain free once again. Richard sees Dr. Ebonie for issues related to his missing big toe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek
programme.desc: 90s heartthrob James Van Der Beek challenges the chefs to create and remix a delectable and iconic Californian burger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos

programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking up a storm with chicken, chicken... and more chicken! She demonstrates the benefits of bulk buying with three fantastic dishes: slow cooker chicken and broccoli, chicken pie and chicken kale caesar salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-Boot
programme.desc: Ree Drummond starts a pizza revolution with mini cauliflower pizzas for lunch with her daughter, a meal kit for herbed chicken Caesar salad pizza, Marsala mushroom and goat cheese flatbreads and a watermelon pizza.

programme.title: The Zoo: Penguins In Love

programme.title: Tanked!: Sherri Shepherd on the Rocks

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A New Year for Villalobos

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Most Valuable Puppy

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: A Modern Mansion and a Historic Gem
programme.desc: Brittany Picolo-Ramos helps a couple that can't decide between a historic or modern home by showing them all of their options. After picking a mansion outside of New Orleans, they make an offer far below the asking price.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Paradise Park vs. Italian Villa
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple needs a bigger home to support their growing family. He's willing to move outside the city limits, but she doesn't want to stray too far from the city. Later, Brittany and the team use a small budget to prep a condo for sale.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Entertainers Dream vs. Broadmoor Estate
programme.desc: A single mom in New Orleans is looking for a home with more space and wouldn't mind buying a property that generates extra income. Then, Brittany makes simple changes to a home's layout to give it better flow so her clients get a quick sale.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Radiant River Home vs. Creekside Cottage
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple wants a bigger home in their current neighborhood. They hope to find a property with outdoor space, an open layout and room for the kids. Then, Brittany transforms a focal point wall to create an inviting feature for potential buyers.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Uptown Mansion vs. Lakefront Estate
programme.desc: A couple that made a fast purchase to accommodate their relocation to New Orleans wants to find a forever home. One loves the city's historic architecture while the other hopes for something modern, leaving Brittany to find a home they both can love.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Waterfront Paradise vs. Garden District Home
programme.desc: A couple has outgrown their home in the Lakeview neighborhood of New Orleans and want to find a property with more space for them and their kids. Meanwhile, Brittany and her team change a house's staging to create a lifestyle buyers can't turn down.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Neoclassical Revival vs. Bywater Beauty
programme.desc: An engaged couple wants to sell their properties and buy their first home together. He wants an open concept layout with outdoor cooking space, and she loves old New Orleans architecture and wants something with an old-world feel and updated amenities.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Gallery Home vs. Luxe Greek Revival
programme.desc: A Texas couple rents a condo in New Orleans' French Quarter, but they want to find a place to call their own. He wants a low-maintenance home and she's hoping for an old-world feel with space for entertaining.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: A Tale of Two Cories
programme.desc: A single dad and his daughter want to build a dream home and gain a sense of stability after renting for over a decade. The daughter is obsessed with the colour blue, so Mika must find a way to incorporate it into the design.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Key West Compromise
programme.desc: A couple calls on Brian and Mika to build a custom home on a gorgeous, lakefront lot. Brian and Mika are challenged to combine his desire for a fun, Key West, FL, paradise with her dream of a peaceful cottage oasis.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Bringing Home Baby

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Brian and Mika Dream Big

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Annabelle the Doll, Salem's Curse and Alien Abduction
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a sinister rag doll said to have the power to kill, a centuries-long curse connected to the Salem Witch Trials and an out-of-this-world abduction that rocked a community.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: House of Horrors, James Dean's Curse and Statue From Hell
programme.desc: Don investigates America's most famous haunted house, the curse of James Dean's death car and a supernatural statue with a life of its own.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Skyscraper Seance, Legally Haunted and Curse of the Mummy
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a spooky pact to communicate with Thomas Edison from beyond the grave, a bizarre legal case that proved a house was haunted and real story behind the legendary curse of King Tut's tomb.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Ancient Alien, Haunted Hotel and Southern Sasquatch
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a mysterious skeleton that sparked rumours of visitors from outer space, the haunted hotel that inspired a bloodcurdling bestseller and a terrifying encounter with a horrific and legendary beast.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: The Yeti's Hand, Crop Circles of the Deep and the Riddle of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Don sheds light on the chilling mission to hunt down the world's most legendary beast, investigates strange patterns on the ocean floor and reveals the secret behind the origins Stonehenge.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Poltergeist, Maine Mutant and the Mysterious Death of Mozart
programme.desc: Don Wildman uncovers the gruesome secret beneath a bucolic Colorado park, examines the remains of a sinister beast that once stalked the woods of Maine and investigates whether a musical maestro was murdered.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Loch Ness, Headless Haunting and Prophet Edgar Cayce
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates the truth behind a legendary monster, recounts the tale of a vengeful lover who returned from the grave and reveals the final resting place of the Sleeping Prophet.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Unknown: Mysterious Box In the Woods/ Musical Rebellion/ Cold War Fighter Jet
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines an unusual box discovered by a farmer in the woods, an ingenious scheme to bring banned music to the masses and a fighter jet involved in one of the most bizarre incidents of the Cold War.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track
programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Jessie: The Telltale Duck
programme.desc: Jessie agrees to accompany Bertram to his high school reunion, so he can show his former classmates how successful he has become.

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Scoop-A-Rooney
programme.desc: A reporter mistakes Maddie for Liv while she's on a date with Josh. Maddie doesn't want Diggie to hear the news from the press, so she asks Liv to play along.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Choose-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Gemma and Johnny Nimbus decide to get married and ask Liv to help plan the wedding. Maddie is torn between Diggie and Josh.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Dancers and Ditzes
programme.desc: Ally is performing at an awards show but the producers are worried about her dancing abilities.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Comebacks and Crystal Balls
programme.desc: As Austin prepares for his big comeback concert, he becomes worried after a fortune teller warns him that something bad is going to happen. Meanwhile, because of the fortune teller, Trish thinks that she is going to meet a prince.

programme.title: Jessie: The Jessie-nator: Grudgement Day
programme.desc: Future Jessie appears from an elevator time machine to warn present Jessie to run for her life. She tells Jessie that when Ravi grows up, he invents a robot version of Bertram which tries to destroy Jessie and take over the world.

programme.title: Jessie: Somebunny's in Trouble
programme.desc: When Zuri loses interest in bunnysitting her class pet, Jessie steps in, only to lose the rabbit. Meanwhile, Emma has a crush on a school jock and enlists Luke’s help to learn more about sports.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Miraculer
programme.desc: Sabrina gets akumatized by Hawk Moth. Now Miraculer, she can steal their powers from superheroes and is determined to show Chloe that she is just as worthy of her interest as Ladybug.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Princess Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: When Sofia and Hildegard become stuck inside an enchanted painting, Hildegard complicates their escape plan by insisting she knows everything.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Baileywhoops
programme.desc: When a new castle steward puts a curse on Baileywick in an attempt to take over his job, Sofia and Minimus must figure out a plan to get Baileywick back.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night
programme.desc: Muffin plays the game of library her way. Mum, Dad and Bingo must pass Swim School. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups of the Dance/ Fantastic Pet Force Gems
programme.desc: Bob wants to take a traditional Irish dance class while visiting Ireland, but when the instructor goes missing, Bingo and Rolly set out on a mission to find him. Then, Bob and Ana enter a costume contest as a superhero duo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Somewhere Under the Rainbow / Yoga Pups
programme.desc: The Pugs head to the end of a rainbow to find a pot big enough for Bob's St. Patrick's Day stew! Bob and the pups plan on joining the Playcare's yoga class!

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather 2

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Ikari Gozen
programme.desc: Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in the giant armour that forms her body.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Video-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv and her band mates are stumped and can't agree on a theme for their new music video. They enlist Parker to shoot the video with his new camera and Diggie enthusiastically signs on to join his crew.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Champ-A-Rooney

programme.title: Jessie: Acting With the Frenemy

programme.title: Jessie: Help Not Wanted
programme.desc: When Jessie needs some extra money for a gift, she accepts a job out of desperation.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped

programme.title: Snapped: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: The disappearance of a Michigan man triggers a tragic chain of events that ends in another man's death nearly 400 miles away.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: After Johnny Altinger vanished, the trail of clues led investigators to a young director. Detectives worried that the case was a hoax staged by a master storyteller. Turns out, the script was darker than anyone knew.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susie Casey was an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce. She was twenty steps from her front door when she vanished. Police were investigating three men in her life. They were all there the morning of her murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deception
programme.desc: Wendy Ratte, a free-spirited mother of two, was missing. Police investigated: a bitter feud with a neighbor, a possible serial killer. Or, did danger lurk closer to home? It'd take an elaborate, undercover mission to finally crack this case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Savior or Sinner?
programme.desc: When a North Carolina preacher's wife is found murdered, police must determine not only who may want her dead, but whether some members of the congregation are mourning – or trying to cover up their part in the violent crime.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Domestic Terror
programme.desc: A Naval officer who rose through the ranks and once questioned terrorists at Guantanamo Bay is found by his wife, dead inside a Florida hotel room. Is the brutal crime connected to his wartime service, or are secrets closer to home to blame?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Swimming With Sharks/ Widowed Witness
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Guilty as Charged/ Family Ties
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a myriad of suspects - from violent felons to lesbian love triangles. In the end, they discover a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Baby Mama Drama/ Two Prints
programme.desc: When a mother is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a path of late-night encounters, secret lovers, and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Murder in Paradise/ High Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise. But despite investigators quickly focusing in on two suspects, nothing comes easy as investigators fight for over a decade to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Dungeons, Dragons, and Death/ Beauty Queen Murder
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover. But the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide just miles away leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs 4 people their lives.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. the 18th Amendment

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XII

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father, Son and Holy Guest Star

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: North Carolina: Giraffic Park
programme.desc: The zoo welcomes a timid giraffe to the herd and gives an epileptic chimp a better life.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: K-9 to 5
programme.desc: It is K9 chaos at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Frosty the Pol-man

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: E-I-E-I-Pol

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Alpacalypse

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Love Wool Find a Way
programme.desc: Dr. Pol performs health checks and gives vaccinations to puppies and foster kittens.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery Inside the Tombs
programme.desc: The iconic pyramids of ancient Egypt represent a profound obsession with the afterlife and stand as the most elaborate tombs in human history; experts use the latest science to reveal the stunning mathematical ingenuity behind their majestic construction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ancient Mystery of Giza
programme.desc: The ancient pyramids of Egypt are perhaps the greatest objects ever built, and the Great Pyramid of Giza stands above them all; experts investigate to determine the date of its much debated construction, and it may be much earlier than originally thought.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Life of Moses
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations in the Holy Land unearth fresh evidence that reveals new secrets about the life of Moses.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ancient Mystery of Giza
programme.desc: The ancient pyramids of Egypt are perhaps the greatest objects ever built, and the Great Pyramid of Giza stands above them all; experts investigate to determine the date of its much debated construction, and it may be much earlier than originally thought.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Life of Moses
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations in the Holy Land unearth fresh evidence that reveals new secrets about the life of Moses.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Animal Mummies: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt's animal mummies are one of antiquity's darkest mysteries, and today, innovative new imaging technology reveals what's inside these strange relics. The shocking truth challenges everything we know about worship in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Forbidden City of the Deep
programme.desc: Experts investigate the world's oldest sunken city and reveal the secrets lost to the ocean almost four thousand years ago.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Death in Dublin
programme.desc: When Elaine O'Hara disappears in 2012, it looks like she's taken her own life. It isn't until her remains are found over a year later that investigators realize there's more to this story -- a dark world of S&M and domination.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: When LeRyan Nicholson's sisters investigate his disappearance, they uncover a series of secrets that lead them to the heartbreaking truth.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: TV Dreams Cut Short
programme.desc: Two young women who dream of big success as television anchors are just embarking on their careers when their plans come to a violent end. They are murdered in their own apartments and there are no signs of forced entry.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Brides and Murder
programme.desc: Two young brides-to-be are just beginning to plan their weddings when their dreams are tragically cut short. Find out if the desperate calls made to 911 reveal the truth about their shocking deaths.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo

programme.title: Breaking Homicide: Secrets of the River

programme.title: Real Detective: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Long-time partners and best friends, Inspectors John Conaty and Ray Giacomelli never thought things would happen the way they did on a Pittsburg, California murder case, where the prime suspect is a dangerous killer, put behind bars years earlier.

programme.title: Real Detective: No One is Safe
programme.desc: Indianapolis Detective Christine Mannina arrives on the scene of an execution-style shooting that's left one man dead and another in critical condition. She knows she must convince a reluctant witness to come forward and put her life on the line.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn't save his life. It's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to follow the bloody trail of clues and piece together the victim's last moments.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Killing Fields
programme.desc: As Detective Rasco digs deeper into the death of an army reserve sergeant, plenty of folk may have wanted to see his demise.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: What the Toddler Saw
programme.desc: When a young mother is ambushed and shot dead in the driveway of her home in Charlotte, NC, Homicide Detective Garry McFadden's best witness may be a three-year-old child her son, who gives the detective a key, but cryptic clue.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Sick Boy
programme.desc: A young mother turns to the internet desperate for help and advice when her young son mysteriously falls ill.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder in the Night
programme.desc: A triple murder leaves three members of a family dead, residents of Lancaster, Pennsylvania are shaken to their cores. With few clues at the crime scene, the search leads detectives on a wild goose chase. Police finally learn the killer's name.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glamorous Glamping Retreat

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse 'Z'
programme.desc: Pete connects with old friends in Canton, NC to build them a Zen-like sanctuary in the trees. Battling a record-fast 9-day build window, the team stays calm in constructing a retreat 15-ft high with a picture perfect view of the Blue Ridge Mountains.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse Point 2.0
programme.desc: Pete and his family gear up to expand their treehouse empire on 23 acres of forest wonderland. As construction kicks off, Pete enlists his son Charlie to oversee the project and builds an incredible treehouse home base for him to live in fulltime.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Homerun Barbecue
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in St. Louis looking for the best deals for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. First up to bat is a slider piled high with pulled pork and chorizo chili. For lunch under the arch, it's a jail cell pork belly BLT.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Chile
programme.desc: Tony samples Chile's delicious cuisine and does some exploring in this land of topographical extremes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oklahoma City
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of Oklahoma City and the stick-to-your-ribs fare that locals have been enjoying for generations. OKC's cattle-ranching roots run deep, and locals love their beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago
programme.desc: Andrew visits the windy city and tastes classic Chicago deep dish pizza and many other great dishes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out

programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rising Ferocity! Tag Battle!
programme.desc: Fresh off the back of their first win, the Victories move on to the tag battle stage of their ultimate showdown against Team Inferno. After his previous defeat, Dante is hungry for a rematch against Gwyn. But who will fight by his side? Delta or Arman?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Doesn't Trustee Angie's Brother
programme.desc: Angie's scam artist brother, Ray, reappears after a long absence looking to make amends with his estranged daughter and the family. George is the first to see through him when Ray asks Veronica to tap into her inheritance to invest in a new company.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Helps Ernie See the Cellu-Light
programme.desc: George helps Ernie lose weight before Mel Powers fires him.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Just Plane Magic
programme.desc: Max and Caroline meet rapper 2 Chainz on a cross-country flight on a private plane to attend a musical awards show.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Broken Hip
programme.desc: Max and Caroline pay a high price for attempting to remove a street performer from the entry to their cupcake shop.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Not-So-Sweet Charity
programme.desc: Max and Caroline approach Caroline's rich but callous Aunt Charity for money to save their failing cupcake shop.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Temporary Distraction
programme.desc: When the girls take office temp jobs, Max finds herself being hit on by the boss, while Caroline tries to climb the corporate ladder.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Estelle Dies

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throws her a farewell party.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One
programme.desc: Ross races to the airport so he can tell Rachel his feelings before she leaves for Paris.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One
programme.desc: Ross tries to convince Rachel to stay, and Joey loses Chick Jr. and Duck Jr. in the foosball tables.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
programme.desc: Rachel leaves her fiancé at the altar and moves in with Monica.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Ross's ex-wife, Carol, tells him she is pregnant and wants to give the baby both her and her female lover's last names, but not Ross's. Monica goes on a manic cleaning spree to impress her parents, who favour Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: American Dad!: Chimdale
programme.desc: Steve learns he has scoliosis and has to wear a back brace, making him the laughing stock of the school. To make him feel better, Stan tells him that he wears a toupee. Meanwhile, Roger and Francine try to sneak into a spa retreat for free.

programme.title: American Dad!: Stan Time
programme.desc: Stan is exhausted every night and doesn't have any time for himself. Stan is ecstatic when his co-worker Dick gives him pills, which allow him to stay up all night but feel like he slept a full eight hours.

programme.title: American Dad!: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the Smiths try to plan a family game night, Roger is full of excuses about prior commitments. But when he is caught in a lie, the Smiths feel betrayed when they realize Roger has been cheating on them with other families.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch

programme.desc: Months after their arranged marriage, a young husband from India allegedly beats his wife to death while the two work an overnight shift in the kitchen of a Maryland donut shop.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Innocence Defiled
programme.desc: The religious leader of a Hindu community in Texas flees after having been convicted of sexually abusing the children of his followers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Digging Into D-Day
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Deciphering the Last Nazi Code
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the former Third Reich in search of an elusive Nazi fortune hidden with a code allegedly created by Hitler's private secretary, and embedded into a piece of sheet music.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: Josh joins leading archeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, the lost colony of Roanoke. Following newly discovered clues, he'll reach new heights as he digs for answers to this over 400-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Digging Into D-Day
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Tracking Tasmania's Tiger
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Australia's island state of Tasmania to investigate sightings of the supposedly extinct Thylacine, also known as the Tasmanian tiger.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender
programme.desc: Dave's crew is hunting for better ground and behind on their gold target. To turn their season around, Dave calls on a mining legend for help searching for gold at the historic Birdseye mine in Montana.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Blue Room Bonanza
programme.desc: Chris makes an incredible discovery that sets the team up on the best gold all season. As winter starts to close in, Dave gets a hot tip that takes him 2,500 miles north to a mine where he pans the biggest nugget of his career.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: All In
programme.desc: In the season finale, it's a race against mother nature at the Blue Room Cut to capitalize on a short weather window before winter closes Team Turin out of Montana. Overcoming early mechanical setbacks, the team perseveres to a surprising end.

programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at the new series 'For Real: The Story of Reality TV'.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Happy 40th Birthday, Kim!
programme.desc: Kim is disappointed that she can’t celebrate her birthday this year due to COVID, so the family pulls out all of the stops to her give the surprise party of her dreams.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Khloe plans a baby shower for her best friend, Malika wrestles with the reality of becoming a single parent. Kourtney gets into cuddling and breakouts of her comfort zoom by forcing herself to be more affectionate.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris, Puppies and Pranks
programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Budget War

programme.desc: Three Food Network stars bring their best friends from their seasons of the show to take on Guy Fieri's games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pork-A-Palooza
programme.desc: Pigs are flying in Flavortown as four chefs put their swine-dining skills to the test making Guy Fieri's pork-inspired dishes.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings in four noodle-savvy chefs from across the US for two rounds of highflying noodle action. One talented chef will use their noodle with their noodles to earn a shot at $20,000, and it's guaranteed that someone is going to get saucy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Sandwich Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri lets three sandwich aficionados cook from home, but that doesn't stop him from bringing the same craziness and curve balls that he throws in Flavortown. In round one, the chefs must flip the ingredients of a diner classic into a tasty sandwich.

programme.desc: A Washington family uproots for a medical marijuana business opportunity in The Algarve, Portugal. They're looking for a place that's furnished and near their children's schools, but he wants a larger detached house with an office and a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters: Afraid To Be Far From Fairfield
programme.desc: A family is tired of renting and looks to purchase a home near Fairfield, Connecticut. He wants to look outside Fairfield so they can get more house for their money, but she's willing to stretch their budget to avoid another long, relocating move.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Take Two in Thailand
programme.desc: After getting divorced, a British man decides to make a new start in Phuket, Thailand. He's looking for a home with enough space to accommodate his kids when they visit, and he prefers to be near both his brother's place and the beach.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Honoring Lola
programme.desc: A couple moved to Las Vegas with their kids and her mom, but their plan to live together was cut short when her mom passed away, Drew and Jonathan are asked to renovate multiple rooms so they can start over in their dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: The High Cost of Cool
programme.desc: Downtown dwellers give up their tiny urban condo to find a detached home with more space and the same modern aesthetic, but hope dwindles after missing out on four offers. When the walls come down, they discover a toxic disaster.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Modern Must-Have
programme.desc: Debra and Dan are squeezed into a tiny urban condo with their three small children and have dreams of staying in the heart of the city. The Property Brothers are leading the charge to help this family find a fixer-upper to transform.

programme.title: Home Again with the Fords: Steel City Bohemian
programme.desc: A couple recently bought his grandparents' Fox Chapel home, but some awkward additions through the decades have left it with a funky floor plan. Leanne and Steve Ford knock down walls to turn a closed off house into a bougie, Bohemian family home.

programme.title: Home Again with the Fords: Cousin Invasion

programme.title: Home Again with the Fords: Farmhouse Family Reunion

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Can You Believe I'm Living Here?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Four Weeks Until Baby

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: The Toilet Is Still in the Hallway
