programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah will help you discover God's truth through practical, life-changing, Bible teachings and apply them to circumstances in your life today.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bumpy Ride
programme.desc: The guys have the chance to add a Grammy to their collection; Corey and Chumlee want to buy a rare mini Coca Cola cooler from the 1930's.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Kings and McQueens
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are blown away when a seller limps in with a 19th century shotgun disguised as a cane.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Face the Music
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars seek counsel when the business card of the infamous Old Western outlaw.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnocchio
programme.desc: Some handcrafted Pinocchio dolls wander into the shop. A guy brings in a Cy Young baseball card from 1909. A man comes by with a harmonica that once belonged to 'Aerosmith' front man Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gnarly Harley
programme.desc: The guys check out a customized 1951 Harley Davidson, and Corey considers adding it to his own collection. Then, a crank organ from the early 1900s is brought in. Later, the guys try to convince Rick to get a manicure.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money Ball
programme.desc: Hail to the chief with the Pawn Stars when an archive of items signed by President Franklin Delano Roosevelt is brought into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Riders On the Pawn
programme.desc: Two flintlock blunderbuss pistols and a David Hasselhoff signed rescue buoy from 'Baywatch'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock, Stock, and Pawn
programme.desc: An all-star Dodger's baseball memorabilia bench, a 19th century Hobbs & Co. lock box, an original Woody Woodpecker oil painting, and a set of educational books called the Delphian Course.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Brothers
programme.desc: 1894 S Barber Dime, a John Belushi autograph, a 1950s Jim Henson puppet pops in, and a 1965 Schwinn bicycle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cutting Edge Pawn
programme.desc: A Pre-Revolutionary American pewter tankard; original postcards by Jean-Michel Basquiat; a 1960's Hydro-Cycle Barracuda watercraft; an early 1900's blueprint copy machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn or Bust
programme.desc: A bust of Marlon Brando has Rick making its owner an offer he can't refuse. It's game on with the Pawn Stars when a Donkey Kong penny bank from the early 1980s barrels into the store. Rick spots a cyclops print made by a member of the band Devo.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Payne in the Putt
programme.desc: By a stroke of luck, a pair of knickers that belonged to golfer Payne Stewart swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: International Pawn of Mystery
programme.desc: Chum gets groovy in Los Angeles while checking out an iconic Austin Powers movie prop. Back at the shop, an Ancient Roman relic marches its way in. Then, Rick tries to make a super deal on an autographed sketch of one of America's very first heroes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn to the Rescue
programme.desc: Rick is in search of his own personal fire truck. Then, Chumlee chases an antique from one of the very first underground transportation systems, and Corey and Rick pursue an exclusive item that belonged to Hunter S. Thompson.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chuminator
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee head to L.A. to 'terminate' a deal on set pieces from the iconic movie 'The Terminator'. Then, Corey checks out some pieces of Alice in Chains memorabilia. Plus, Rick and Chumlee test some old steel printing plates.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnanza
programme.desc: The guys check out some vintage horse equipment and a rare Pee-wee Herman scooter. Afterwards, a seller offers a signed poster from the TV show 'Bonanza', a first edition of 'To Kill a Mockingbird' flies into the store.

programme.desc: Emma's first day of high school starts badly when she clashes with tough transfer student Rosie. The two soon become friends when they realize they have a lot in common. Kenny the Koala winds up in Luke's backpack, and Jessie struggles with Zuri.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Crush Hour

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Bunk'd: MoSquito Mo Problems

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Can't Hardly Date
programme.desc: Sydney thinks her dad might be lonely, so she encourages him to start dating again. When Young Max breaks his skateboard again, Mom makes him earn money to buy a replacement.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Dungeons, Dragons, and Death/ Beauty Queen Murder
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover. But the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide just miles away leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs 4 people their lives.

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Family's Nightmare
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey search for new clues in the fatal shooting of a mother of six that was initially considered a suicide. Their investigation exposes a heart-breaking trail of secrets hidden for 25 years.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Fatal Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey return to Fort Myers, Florida to investigate the 1997 murder of an aspiring police officer robbed and fatally shot in his motel room. The suspects include four local men and a female witness that may have set him up.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Inside the Episode: Home Alone
programme.desc: Special episode featuring insights from Kelly Siegler and behind-the-scenes facts.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: This was a case that stayed with Josh Mankiewicz for years. After a young Army veteran disappeared, detectives uncovered a cryptic 911 call placed 11 days before she went missing, which exposed a twisted story and the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: Wendy Trapaga was a beaming young bride. Then, just four days after saying 'I do' she was found dead in a parking lot. Investigators discovered the newlyweds were keeping secrets. There was also someone else with a secret and it was combustible.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: In high school, Christian, Erika and Pedro formed a tight trio: best friends who excelled at academics and shared big dreams. When they went to college something changed. It started with a secret romance and ended in tragedy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Dungeons, Dragons, and Death/ Beauty Queen Murder
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover. But the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide just miles away leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs 4 people their lives.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Motorcycles, Murder and Mystery
programme.desc: An outspoken radio personality and veterans' advocate is gunned down in her own bedroom. Did her strong opinions make her a target, or did a litany of family secrets lead to her murder?

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Best of Friends
programme.desc: When the body of insurance salesman Brian Davis is found alongside a bayou in Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana, police discover that he is a man with a life full of secrets. But could those closest to him be hiding the biggest secret of all?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Nikki Whitehead was a single mom working toward a brighter future. She found love, moved into a nice neighborhood and enrolled in college. Then, tragedy struck. Police searched for answers but one thing was certain. This crime was personal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Was Waiting
programme.desc: Vince Goslyn found his calling in the military. His career was thriving and he had built a beautiful family. Then one night, the father of five was gunned down. Did his decision to help someone in need cost him his life or was he targeted?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Savior or Sinner?
programme.desc: When a North Carolina preacher's wife is found murdered, police must determine not only who may want her dead, but whether some members of the congregation are mourning – or trying to cover up their part in the violent crime.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Under the Crawlspace
programme.desc: When a friendly bet exposes a terrifying scene under a California home, investigators unravel a 14-year-old missing person's case. Eventually, when deeply buried secrets come to light, and a dark family truth is revealed, justice is finally served.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Last Person Inside
programme.desc: When a concerned neighbor stumbles onto a horrifying scene in a Spokane, Washington home, a family is devastated and some buried secrets come to light. Investigators unravel a bizarre web of truths and lies to find enough evidence to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Dark of Night
programme.desc: The joy of Christmas looks bright for a doting Oklahoma Mom. But her kids wake up to a living nightmare when she's inexplicably gone. As investigators track two suspects down a deceitful road, an incendiary break lures the killer out of the dark.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: When Hell Freezes Over
programme.desc: When the car of a Southern California girl is found abandoned, investigators spend years and travel hundreds of miles trying to solve her mysterious disappearance. Finally, an unimaginable backyard discovery by drug agents leads to a vicious killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: A Florida co-ed disappears after a night on the town. As investigators trace her last steps, they fear some missing girls at another campus might be connected. But when a dog sniffs out a backyard grave, the key to this mystery is far closer to home.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Saint and Sinner
programme.desc: A former Catholic priest turned realtor vanishes from Florida and investigators find themselves examining circumstances stranger than their suspects. When a tip exposes a murder-for-hire scheme, the mastermind is revealed as a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fear in Florida
programme.desc: When a thriving real estate agent disappears, Florida investigators scrutinize the men in her life. But when other women vanish, something more sinister may be at play. It takes a risky escape from an abductor to finally unbury some horrific truths.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Flat-Top O' the Morning to Ya

programme.desc: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it’s up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Voodoo Zombies/ Life After Death
programme.desc: Voodoo Zombies explores claims of the existence of zombies in Haiti. In Life After Death patients experience strange effects after life saving transplant operations.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Terror Island
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Lady of the Lake
programme.desc: Florence and Mark Unger love nothing more than vacationing at the lake with their two boys. Life is perfect, until an old sports injury pulls Mark into the depths of painkiller addiction. To keep her family afloat, Florence does whatever is necessary.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death at the Door
programme.desc: A former cop calls 911, struggling to explain he's been shot multiple times and his girlfriend has been abducted. Investigators race to save the caller--they need his help to find the missing woman and the gunman, who might be a drug cartel hitman.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: John works with investigators to bring Frank Contreras into custody after he commits a terrible crime witnessed by a child; Cal takes on a heartbreaking case where authorities desperately need the public's help to identify a vicious criminal.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: When the sexy and beautiful Charlene is around, sparks fly. But the sparks aren't limited to one man. One after another, Josh, Jace, Tim and Casey all go crazy vying for her love. And while love is a many splendored thing, it can also have a body count.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Five Months of Hell
programme.desc: Chris and Theresa Lockhart seem like a perfectly matched couple. But when one of them vanishes, it leads to five months of hell for everyone and a final, shocking act that reveals all.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Death by Stiletto
programme.desc: A night ends in tragedy when Stefan Andersson is bludgeoned to death by girlfriend Ana Trujillo – and her five- inch stiletto heel. She claims self defense but a jury found her guilty of murder. Candice Delong wants to know what turned her into a killer.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Gone Too Soon
programme.desc: Baby Dylan was 3 months old when his mother, Alexandra Tobias shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of second degree murder and sentenced to 50 years. Candice DeLong digs deeper to find out what made this young mom snap.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Horseplay and Hired Guns
programme.desc: Neil Olsen was found dead inside the barn where he kept his horse, trampled to death, but investigators find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Homicidal Honeymooner
programme.desc: Ashley Humphrey kills Sandee Rozzo, but Ashley claims it was her new husband, Tracey, who wanted Sandee dead.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Rough Diamond
programme.desc: A couple's robbing spree to buy drugs turns into a murder spree when the body count adds up.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Gold, Guns and God
programme.desc: Allen Keith isn't your typical small-town preacher. He also runs a pawn shop, frequented by gold buyers, gun dealers, and fellow pastors. But the pawnshop turns out to be a far cry from the pulpit, and before long and a stone-cold killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Shattered: A Very Bad Day
programme.desc: One morning in 1994, a high school student holds his class hostage at gunpoint. As students, teachers and police are faced with impending disaster, they have no idea that the worst of the day's carnage is yet to be discovered.

programme.title: Shattered: Welcome to Santa Claus
programme.desc: December 1997. Santa Claus, Georgia. A ten-year-old girl is kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the night. A woman fears something terrible has happened at her friend's home. A deputy on a routine welfare check discovers a house of horrors.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Texts and Threats
programme.desc: After losing his dream girl to an older guy, Seath Jackson launches into a bitter social media war with his ex and her new man. Soon after, Seath disappears. Detectives work to find out if this is a runaway case or something more serious.

programme.title: Suspicion: A Daughter Disappears
programme.desc: When 16 year old Skylar Neese vanishes overnight, her parents, Mary and Dave, are instantly sucked into a mysterious world of chaos, rumor and innuendo. But, only after a heart-rending 6 months, does the unimaginable and violent truth finally emerge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken Away
programme.desc: Jessie Bardwell seemingly vanished from the Texas home she shared with her boyfriend, Jason Lowe. Fearing the worst, her father traveled to Texas to start the search for his daughter. Her body was later found on a farm wrapped in a sheet.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: This Bullet's for You
programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Jeffersonian Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: Pete and his patriots descend upon Virginia for the first time to bring the treehouse revolution to Bella Rose Plantation. Drawing on the architectural innovations of Thomas Jefferson, Pete designs a luxurious two-story treehouse with colonial columns.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Adventure Headquarters
programme.desc: Pete and the NTS gang embark on an epic quest to give a thrill-seeking couple the treehouse of their dreams. This house will be an adventure headquarters in the sky, sitting 16 feet high with a wraparound deck that provides 360 degrees of stunning views.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: City Sleeker Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete is back in Texas to build a sophisticated, sleek-and-chic treehouse in the heart of Dallas. Daryl and the NTS team put treehouse engineering to the ultimate test at Washington State University, proving down-to-the-pound the power of the TAB.

programme.title: Restored: 1952 Midcentury Masterpiece
programme.desc: A couple wants to renovate their mid-century modern California ranch home but are not sure where to begin. Brett works to blend her traditional style with his more modern tastes for an extensive and unique remodel.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with fascinating stories and unrealized potential. Many of these homes suffer from neglect, bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: Mystery of the English Cottage
programme.desc: A young family has purchased a 1920s English cottage in Redlands, California, for their forever home. Something is funky with the living room and they can't figure out what. Brett solves the mystery, removing all the 1970s additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1910 Arts and Crafts Family Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1910 arts and crafts farmhouse for a family who relocates from the big city to the countryside of Cherry Valley, California. They hope to become organic farmers and want to include elements for the family farm and business.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kings design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fired Up
programme.desc: Roger Mooking runs down 15 of the best fire- and smoke-kissed dishes across the U.S., including all the pork, beef, chicken and flaming desserts. Also, chefs offer recipes and more on how to cook over an open flame.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Like Mama Made
programme.desc: Local favorites feature comfort food just like mama used to make. From mac 'n' cheese in Detroit and chicken pot pie in Portland to fried chicken in Atlanta and classic meatloaf in Kansas City, these foods are warm, cozy and nostalgic.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Grub on the Go
programme.desc: From a New Jersey drive-in slinging sky-high burgers, a New Orleans doughnut shop turning diner dinner classics into quick-bite handhelds and a Southern California spot serving decadent seafood fries.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking is checking out the best combinations of eggs, gravy, breakfast meat and fried dough that make up the 12 greatest breakfasts in the country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Nutty for Nuts
programme.desc: Today is going to be a little nut! Hazelnuts can sweeten a savory dish, peanuts can bring a bit of saltiness to a dessert, and pistachios can add a crunchy texture.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out

programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: See Jimmy Run/ Trading Faces
programme.desc: Jimmy adapts his running shoes so that he can move at lightning speed; Jimmy comes up with an invention that will allow him to read Cindy's mind.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Love Potion 9.368
programme.desc: A laboratory mishap exposes Jimmy, Carl and Sheen to a powerful love potion.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Journey to the Centre of Carl/ Professor Calamitous
programme.desc: Professor Calamitous schemes to make Jimmy his slave and forcing him to do unwanted acts.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Billion Dollar Boy/ The Mighty Wheezers
programme.desc: A spoiled kid decides he wants Jimmy's dog, but he's not for sale.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Beach Party Mummy
programme.desc: Bored by class discussions, Jimmy decides to take his classmates to see the real thing.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Tommorow Boys
programme.desc: The boys travel to the future and discover that Libby has become a tyrannical dictator.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Out Darn Spotlight
programme.desc: Jimmy is desperate to get the staring role opposite dream girl Betty Quinlan in the school musical, Macbeth in Space.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Stranded
programme.desc: An argument between Jimmy and Cindy leaves them stranded together.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Normal Boy/ Birth of a Salesman
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a machine to make himself less smart; Jimmy uses his genius to sell candy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Lights, Camera, Danger!
programme.desc: Jimmy and friends are cast in Quintin Smithee's next big movie production.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Wreck Your Neck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Adam Up
programme.desc: In an effort to get out of training duties, Adam enlists Leo's help to create a duplicate Adam using Davenport's experimental cloning device.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Memory Wipe
programme.desc: After coming home with a poor report card, Leo uses Davenport's award-winning memory erasing device to wipe Davenport's short term memory but inadvertently erases 25 years, rendering him a teenager.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Trent Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Leo and Chase use Davenport's technology to get back at Trent on the day of a big test. Meanwhile, Bree gets exposed to a hair growth cream and has disastrous results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Not So Smart Phone
programme.desc: Chase and Adam record themselves doing bionic stunts but then have to scramble to find the phone they used before their secret is exposed. Meanwhile, Leo and Bree scheme to help Perry spend her fortune.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Scramble the Orbs
programme.desc: Leo invents his first high end technology and when he tests the orbs on himself and they appear to work fine. However, problems arise when the orbs can't differentiate between friend and foe and start attacking anyone who comes into contact with Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Taken
programme.desc: Fearful of Krane's plan to destroy the Lab Rats, Douglas makes an attempt to warn the Lab Rats and Davenport about Krane’s evil agenda, but is rebuffed by Davenport.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Which Father Knows Best?
programme.desc: Davenport’s attempts at rebuilding Bree’s bionic chip fail, forcing Leo to go behind his back and ask his brother Douglas for help. However, when the chip becomes life threatening the two brothers are forced to work together.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Alien Gladiators
programme.desc: Leo and Davenport attend fan convention and face off in an epic fire staff battle. Meanwhile, Adam, Bree, and Chase attend the convention dressed like their favorite 'Alien Gladiators' characters in search of the movie's star.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Cyborg Shark Attack
programme.desc: After Leo sees a shark movie that terrifies him, Adam and Chase scare him by repurposing a Davenport Industries cyborg shark. However, the shark's artificial intelligence goes rogue, and Chase, Adam, Leo and Janelle find themselves trapped in the house.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Greatest Tag-Battle Ever!
programme.desc: On the cusp of the final tag team battle, the Victories are only one point away from losing everything! Arman is sure that Dante and Delta are the best chance they have to win. It's time they prove it by using their combined forces to take Inferno down!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.
